key_strategy.item_key_space: Preserve legacy CF-* seam identifiers as stable backlog item keys during migration to the unified dossier-engineer runtime.
key_strategy.delivery_state_rule: Legacy intaken maps to implemented by explicit operator instruction; confirmed maps to planned; remaining candidate seams stay defined unless a carried migration gap blocks them.
key_strategy.source_traceability: Architecture and legacy planning inputs stay attached through registered source IDs, while current truth is read from dossier-engineer backlog state after packet apply.

items.title: Operator-only Telegram conversational egress and reply loop
